name: io.github.InstaCode/icloud-drive-mcp-server
description: MCP server for iCloud Drive on macOS — Spotlight search, Finder tags, .icloud placeholder handling, and safe Trash-based deletion.

environment_variables.name: ICLOUD_MCP_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Absolute path the server is allowed to read/write within. Typically ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs or a subdirectory of it.

environment_variables.name: ICLOUD_MCP_WRITE
environment_variables.description: Set to "1" to enable write tools (write_file, set_tags, delete_file). Read-only by default.
